title: GUP KHIAT KA HIH NUNG SANG

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ke'n nei khin tang ka sak nop la
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
Kumpi Honpa phatna la
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
Ama min tawh vanglian ning
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
Ka Honpa' min in ka vanglian ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ke'n nei hong lungkimsak khazih
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
Ama deih bek ka bawl ding hi
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ke'n nei kitel teci panna
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
Beisak launa leh up lahna
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ke'n nei kei ading inn muanpi
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
Tua'h a tawntung ka um ding hi
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang
